name: 0Latency Memory
description: Long-term memory for AI agents. Store and recall memories across conversations using the 0Latency API.
detailed_description:
0Latency Memory gives AI agents persistent, structured memory that survives conversation resets. Perfect for developers building agents that need to remember user preferences, past decisions, and contextual information.

Key Features:
• Extract & store structured memories from conversations
• Semantic recall for relevant context retrieval
• Keyword search across all stored memories
• List, manage, and export your data
• Privacy-first: tenant-isolated, you own your data

Use Cases:
• Personal AI assistants that remember preferences
• Customer service agents with context continuity
• Research agents that build knowledge over time
• Developer tools that track project context

Requires an API key from https://0latency.ai (free tier available).

logo_guidelines.style: Simple, recognizable icon that works at small sizes
logo_guidelines.notes: Logo must be uploaded separately through GPT Store interface

example_prompts: Remember that I'm working on a CRM project using Python
What do you know about my tech stack preferences?
Store this: My team meets every Monday at 10am PT
Export all my stored memories as JSON
